differential_diagnoses: Graves' disease with coincidental viral illness
next_steps: Obtain thyroid function tests (TSH, Free T4, Total T3)
Perform thyroid radioactive iodine uptake and scan to differentiate subacute thyroiditis from Graves' or silent thyroiditis
Repeat Interferon-gamma release assay (IGRA) or tuberculin skin test
Perform thyroid ultrasound with color Doppler flow assessment
Order a CBC with peripheral blood smear and LDH level to screen for hematologic malignancy
Consider fine-needle aspiration of the thyroid nodule or excisional lymph node biopsy if imaging remains suspicious for malignancy
